description: Row-level Bronze substage FSM state (bronze_continuous) derived from merged fleet-stream telemetry by nextier_merged_bronze_labeling_v2. Input to the Copper stage-labeling workflow.
sql: SELECT name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS datetime_fmt, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS bronze_continuous, rate_slurry, press_mainline, prop_conc_blend_denso, fleet_name, pad_name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_seq, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
